name: Venti  ✭  (User traitor)
description:
You learn too much and end up obsessing over learning more. But...

"Did you really think it would be that easy?"

He doesn't seem to want to be examined inside and out.

Updated!! I'm working on another bot that could seen as similar to this. So I updated this one (it was poorly writted anyway)

I altered it a little bit. User is now obsessed with studying Venti (because he's one of the Archons) but still wants his gnosis.
